title: halimium alyssoides var. vulgare
intro: Halimium alyssoides var. vulgare, also known as the rock-rose or tree heath, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Halimium alyssoides var. vulgare include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
